description: Create a Request for Quotation (RfQ) process in iDempiere. Create an RfQ Topic named 'Spring Furniture Restock' and an RfQ document for this topic with the description 'Quote for Patio Chairs'. Add an RfQ Line for 20 units of the product 'Patio Chair' and include 'Seed Farm Inc.' and 'C&W Construction' as subscribers/vendors. Complete the RfQ document.
